data.body: Plan-review triage (run 1: PASS, 0 blocking, 19 advisory). All advisories remediated by amending the description EXCEPT one, justified here: the DET ac-quality finding that S-item criteria bundle deliverables with 'and' — deliberate house epic style (identical to 1fa8/smoky-flare-slug): each S-item becomes a child story at decomposition time whose own AC split into independently verifiable items. Amendments applied: commit-msg hook install prerequisite in merge-back recipe + S4 troubleshooting (ff11e095/f5c13d22); S6 cost/latency made observable — ADR 'Cost & latency' section with named metrics from S5 runs (fb0fb1e0); S2 explicit edit targets incl. voter.py branch-before-get_patch (f20d1038); files/-default-base fixture verification promoted to S2's first step, the plan's riskiest assumption (fa7c0e45); merge detection located inside review_and_vote transparent to webhook/reconciler//rerun + reconcile.py no-change asserted by test (f5ee6ca9/f465b50d); g2p branch-agnostic contradiction resolved — expectation in design, verified statement + run-log done-definition in S3 (fdbcd23d/f86c0cb5/fabc6d3d/ff2275d1); merge-context schema assemble_merge_change_context co-located in assemble.py reusing DIFF_CHAR_CAP, empty-diff case defined (f0b92e4d/f2ee1060); size-cap apportionment specified — combined cap, mergelist capped first at 100 subjects (f7d322ee); robot-comment template via _TAG_SUFFIXES merge-change variant (f0ee6494); observability — structured log events + observability.sh metric + runbook signals (fd731572/fee8b0e7); Push Merge Commit bound to named feature-branch-drivers group (f299aa08); submit-type pin transition safety — record prior value, quiet window, distinct back-out (fc6647bc); vague 'clean' success criterion replaced with recorded hit-list check (f607dd45 partial).
